'''âm-d-h''' ('''madaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:necropost|necropost]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-d-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:necropost|necropost]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-d-h
|-
! Lemma
| madaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:madahithi|madahithi]] || [[word:madahiji|madahiji]] || [[word:madahishi|madahishi]] || [[word:madahi|madahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:madahuthuth|madahuthuth]] || [[word:madahujuj|madahujuj]] || [[word:madahushush|madahushush]] || [[word:madah|madah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:madahuthu|madahuthu]] || [[word:madahuju|madahuju]] || [[word:madahushu|madahushu]] || [[word:madahu|madahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:madahufuth|madahufuth]] || [[word:madahufuj|madahufuj]] || [[word:madahufush|madahufush]] || [[word:madahuf|madahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:madahethe|madahethe]] || [[word:madaheje|madaheje]] || [[word:madaheshe|madaheshe]] || [[word:madahe|madahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:madahothoth|madahothoth]] || [[word:madahojoj|madahojoj]] || [[word:madahoshosh|madahoshosh]] || [[word:madah|madah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:madahotho|madahotho]] || [[word:madahojo|madahojo]] || [[word:madahosho|madahosho]] || [[word:madaho|madaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:madahofoth|madahofoth]] || [[word:madahofoj|madahofoj]] || [[word:madahofosh|madahofosh]] || [[word:madahof|madahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:madahĂŠthĂŠ|madahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:madahĂŠjĂŠ|madahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:madahĂŠshĂŠ|madahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:madahĂŠ|madahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:madahathath|madahathath]] || [[word:madahajaj|madahajaj]] || [[word:madahashash|madahashash]] || [[word:madah|madah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:madahatha|madahatha]] || [[word:madahaja|madahaja]] || [[word:madahasha|madahasha]] || [[word:madaha|madaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:madahafath|madahafath]] || [[word:madahafaj|madahafaj]] || [[word:madahafash|madahafash]] || [[word:madahaf|madahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:madahasha|madahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomadahasha|gomadahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimadahasha|gokimadahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:madahnĂŒsha|madahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomadahnknĂŒsha|gomadahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimadahnĂŒsha|gokimadahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:madahshĂ«sha|madahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomadahnkshĂ«sha|gomadahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimadahshĂ«sha|gokimadahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:madahrosha|madahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomadahnkrosha|gomadahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimadahrosha|gokimadahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:madahmusha|madahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadahnkmusha|gomadahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadahmusha|gokimadahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:madahsherasha|madahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomadahnksherasha|gomadahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimadahsherasha|gokimadahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:madahngasha|madahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomadahnkngasha|gomadahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimadahngasha|gokimadahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:madahyasha|madahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomadahnkyasha|gomadahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimadahyasha|gokimadahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:madahyamasha|madahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomadahnkyamasha|gomadahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimadahyamasha|gokimadahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:madahnĂŒshĂ«sha|madahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomadahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gomadahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimadahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokimadahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:madahnĂŒrosha|madahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomadahnknĂŒrosha|gomadahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimadahnĂŒrosha|gokimadahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madahnĂŒmusha|madahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadahnknĂŒmusha|gomadahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadahnĂŒmusha|gokimadahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:madahshĂ«nĂŒsha|madahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomadahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gomadahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimadahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokimadahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:madahshĂ«rosha|madahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomadahnkshĂ«rosha|gomadahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimadahshĂ«rosha|gokimadahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madahshĂ«musha|madahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadahnkshĂ«musha|gomadahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadahshĂ«musha|gokimadahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:madahronĂŒsha|madahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomadahnkronĂŒsha|gomadahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimadahronĂŒsha|gokimadahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:madahroshĂ«sha|madahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomadahnkroshĂ«sha|gomadahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimadahroshĂ«sha|gokimadahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madahromusha|madahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadahnkromusha|gomadahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadahromusha|gokimadahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:madahmunĂŒsha|madahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomadahnkmunĂŒsha|gomadahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimadahmunĂŒsha|gokimadahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:madahmushĂ«sha|madahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomadahnkmushĂ«sha|gomadahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimadahmushĂ«sha|gokimadahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:madahmurosha|madahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomadahnkmurosha|gomadahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimadahmurosha|gokimadahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:madah|madah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠdĂŠh|mĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homadah|homadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠdĂŠh|homĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomadah|hohomadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠdĂŠh|hohomĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmadah|nĂŒmadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠdĂŠh|nĂŒmĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmadah|nĂŒnĂŒmadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠdĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmadah|nĂŻmadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠdĂŠh|nĂŻmĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmadah|nĂŻnĂŻmadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠdĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumadah|lumadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠdĂŠh|lumĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumadah|lulumadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠdĂŠh|lulumĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limadah|limadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠdĂŠh|limĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimadah|lilimadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠdĂŠh|lilimĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komadah|komadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠdĂŠh|komĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomadah|kokomadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠdĂŠh|kokomĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemadah|kemadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠdĂŠh|kemĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemadah|kekemadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠdĂŠh|kekemĂŠdĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
